title: Qlik Sense App
description: Schema representing a Qlik Sense analytics application in Qlik Cloud, including its metadata, ownership, space assignment, and reload information.

id.description: The unique identifier of the app, assigned by the Qlik Cloud platform.

name.description: The display name of the app.

description.description: A human-readable description of the app and its purpose.

thumbnail.description: URL to the app thumbnail image.

lastReloadTime.description: The date and time of the most recent successful data reload in ISO 8601 format.

createdDate.description: The date and time when the app was initially created.

modifiedDate.description: The date and time when the app was last modified.

owner.description: The display name of the app owner.

ownerId.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the app.

published.description: Indicates whether the app has been published to a managed space.

publishTime.description: The date and time when the app was published. Null if the app is not published.

custom.description: Custom properties assigned to the app as key-value pairs.

dynamicColor.description: A color expression evaluated dynamically for the app representation in the hub.

hasSectionAccess.description: Indicates whether the app uses section access for row-level security.

isDirectQueryMode.description: Indicates whether the app operates in Direct Query mode, querying data sources in real time rather than loading data into memory.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the app data is encrypted at rest using customer-managed keys.

originAppId.description: The identifier of the origin app if this app was created by copying or publishing another app.

spaceId.description: The identifier of the space containing the app. Null if the app is in the personal space.

tenantId.description: The identifier of the Qlik Cloud tenant the app belongs to.

usage.description: The intended use case for the app.

links.description: HATEOAS links for navigating related resources.

space.description: Reference to the space containing this app.

reload.description: Reference to the most recent reload of this app.

href.description: The URL of the linked resource.

SpaceReference.description: A reference to a Qlik Cloud space that contains and governs access to resources.

id.description: The unique identifier of the space.

name.description: The display name of the space.

description.description: A human-readable description of the space.

ownerId.description: The identifier of the space owner.

tenantId.description: The identifier of the tenant the space belongs to.

updatedAt.description: When the space was last updated.

ReloadReference.description: A reference to a data reload operation for a Qlik Sense app.

id.description: The unique identifier of the reload.

status.description: The current status of the reload.

partial.description: Whether this was a partial reload.

duration.description: The duration of the reload in ISO 8601 duration format.

SpaceAssignment.description: A role assignment for a user or group within a space.

id.description: The unique identifier of the assignment.

type.description: Whether the assignee is a user or group.

assigneeId.description: The identifier of the assigned user or group.

roles.description: The roles granted to the assignee in this space.

spaceId.description: The space this assignment applies to.

updatedAt.description: When the assignment was last updated.
